title: Intense Herbal French Fruit Gratin
description: A light and flavorful French dessert featuring poached fruit, herbal jam, and a molten crust, perfect for a low-calorie friendly treat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a medium saucepan, combine the mixed berries, herbal jam, honey, and lemon juice, and cook over low heat until the berries are tender.
In a large bowl, whisk together the egg whites and low-fat milk until stiff peaks form.
Fold the cooked berry mixture into the egg mixture until well combined.
In a small bowl, mix together the whole wheat breadcrumbs and chopped fresh thyme.
Pour the berry and egg mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with the breadcrumb mixture.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional fresh thyme if desired.
